summary: Phase 4 RAG AI Chatbot testing complete. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). All 20 frontend UI tests passed. The chatbot uses Claude Sonnet via emergentintegrations to answer product questions from a 93-product catalog. Features verified: floating chat widget on all pages, dedicated /chat page, product search via MongoDB text index, conversation history, lead capture, WhatsApp routing.
passed_tests: POST /api/chat with message and session_id returns AI response with product data
POST /api/chat with 'titanium plates' query returns products_referenced > 0
POST /api/chat multi-turn conversation maintains context (same session_id)
GET /api/chat/history with non-existent session returns empty messages
POST /api/chat/lead with name+phone creates a lead in database
POST /api/chat/lead with minimal data (name + phone) succeeds
frontend_tests_passed: Chat widget floating button visible on homepage (bottom-right, green circle at x=1844, y=1004)
Clicking chat widget button opens the chat window
Chat window shows 'Agile Ortho Assistant' header with Online status
Welcome message appears on first open
Quick question suggestions appear below welcome message
Clicking a suggestion sends it as a message and gets AI response
User can type and send a message via input + send button
AI response renders with bold text and bullet points
Close button (X) closes the chat window
Chat widget visible on /products page (appears on all pages)
Dedicated /chat page loads with full-screen chat interface
/chat page has WhatsApp button in header (links to wa.me)
/chat page has Call button in header
/chat page shows suggestions on first load
/chat page shows 'Agile Ortho AI Assistant' header
/chat page welcome message appears
/chat page suggestion click sends message and gets AI response
/chat page user can type and send message
'Made with Emergent' badge is removed from the site
Footer does not contain 'emergent' text
critical_code_review_comments: Chat API correctly uses emergentintegrations LlmChat with Claude Sonnet model
Product search uses MongoDB text index with keyword regex fallback for comprehensive results
Conversation history properly stored in MongoDB conversations collection
Lead capture validates required fields (name, phone_whatsapp) and calculates lead score
ChatWidget.jsx and Chat.jsx share session_id via sessionStorage for continuity
AI responses properly formatted with bold text (**text**) and bullet points
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing were cleaned up

features_verified.chat_api_post: POST /api/chat returns AI response with session_id, products_referenced, lead_signal
features_verified.chat_lead_capture_api: POST /api/chat/lead creates lead with name+phone validation
features_verified.chat_widget_floating_button: Green circle button visible bottom-right on all pages
features_verified.chat_widget_opens: Click opens chat window with header and messages
features_verified.chat_widget_header: 'Agile Ortho Assistant' with Online status indicator
features_verified.chat_widget_welcome: Welcome message appears on first open
features_verified.chat_widget_suggestions: Quick question suggestions appear below welcome
features_verified.chat_widget_send_message: User can type and send via input + send button
features_verified.chat_widget_ai_response: AI responds with formatted text (bold, bullets)
features_verified.chat_widget_close: X button closes the chat window
features_verified.emergent_badge_removed: 'Made with Emergent' badge removed from index.html

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 RAG AI Chatbot fully functional. Chat API uses Claude Sonnet via emergentintegrations. Product search uses MongoDB text index on product_name, description, category, division, material fields. Session IDs stored in sessionStorage and shared between ChatWidget and /chat page. Previous iterations 1-17 covered other features (product detail, deduplication, PDF import, admin dashboard). All 93 products in catalog are searchable.
